name: ExternalBridge
description: Bridged attestation from an external EAS schema. Allows reputation signals from ENS, Gitcoin Passport, POAPs, and other EAS-compatible protocols to contribute to the trust graph at reduced weight.

fields.name: normalizedScore
fields.description: Platform-normalized 0–100 score from the external signal

notes: Lower weight by default (0.4× multiplier). normalizedScore scales the dimension weights. External signals inform but do not dominate. sourceType=3 (other) requires manual platform approval.
